body.title: CLOSED: Add Pass condition as required section to ticket template + audit-ticket check
body.result: Added Pass condition as 5th required section to /ticket template; added check 8.5 + [pass-condition] finding to /audit-ticket. Skills updated.
body.description:
All tickets must include an explicit 'Pass condition' labeled section — one observable sentence proving end-to-end delivery, distinct from Test plan. Update /ticket SKILL.md description template to include the section. Update /audit-ticket SKILL.md to flag tickets where Pass condition is absent or is just 'tests pass'.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/ticket/SKILL.md, ~/.claude/skills/audit-ticket/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN = add Pass condition to template and audit check; OUT = no cc_queue.py schema changes (field lives inside description text, not a new column)
**Test plan:** manual — /ticket SKILL.md shows the new section in the template; /audit-ticket SKILL.md shows the flag rule with examples
**Pass condition:** a ticket filed via /ticket shows 'Pass condition:' in its description; /audit-ticket flags a description missing it
